reason: Browser use feature successfully opens a browser, navigates to a URL, extracts page title information, and reports results back to the user with "Example Domain" mentioned in the response.
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing the Gamut application with agent list
Find and click the "QA-20260702-225248-t0vg" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened with chat interface displayed
Send message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message typed and sent successfully, agent status changed to "working"
Wait up to 3 minutes for response — Response received in 18 seconds with agent reporting page title as "Example Domain"

Verify response mentions "Example Domain" and take screenshot — Response clearly states "The page title is 'Example Domain'" with tool calls shown for Open Browser, Browser Get State, and Close Browser
